violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Hamburger buns were in contact and sitting on 10lb raw hamburger tubes.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Both ice scoops behind the bar and the ice scoop stored on top of the ice machine are sitting on dry cloths in-between use. These should be stored on or in a solid, cleanable surface.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Upon inspection the reach in double-door cooler was not keeping temperature below 41F.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Storage area to the left of the casino entrance has single-use items stored on the floor (Baskets, Lids).
Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. - Two separate bags of clean cloths stored on the floor of the dry-storage area.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mops are not hanging. Mops should be hung up in a way to allow air drying when not in-use.
